# com.eddie.mini-claude-bot.plist.template
Label=com.eddie.mini-claude-bot
ProgramArguments=__HOME__/Projects/mini-claude-bot/.venv/bin/uvicorn
WorkingDirectory=backend.main:app
RunAtLoad=--host
KeepAlive=0.0.0.0
StandardOutPath=--port
StandardErrorPath=8000
EnvironmentVariables=__HOME__/Projects/mini-claude-bot
PATH=/tmp/mini-claude-bot.log
GATEWAY_CLAUDE_TIMEOUT=/tmp/mini-claude-bot.log

# com.eddie.ollama.plist.template
Label=com.eddie.ollama
ProgramArguments=/opt/homebrew/opt/ollama/bin/ollama
WorkingDirectory=serve
RunAtLoad=/opt/homebrew/var
KeepAlive=Aqua
LimitLoadToSessionType=REDACTED
StandardOutPath=LoginWindow
StandardErrorPath=StandardIO
EnvironmentVariables=System
OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=/opt/homebrew/var/log/ollama.log
OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE=/opt/homebrew/var/log/ollama.log

# com.eddie.centurion.plist.template
Label=com.eddie.centurion
ProgramArguments=__HOME__/Projects/centurion/.venv/bin/python
WorkingDirectory=-m
RunAtLoad=centurion
KeepAlive=__HOME__/Projects/centurion
StandardOutPath=/tmp/centurion.log
StandardErrorPath=/tmp/centurion.log
EnvironmentVariables=__HOME__/.local/bin:__HOME__/Projects/centurion/.venv/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
PATH=8100

# com.eddie.telegram-claude-hero.plist.template
Label=com.eddie.telegram-claude-hero
ProgramArguments=__HOME__/Projects/telegram-claude-hero/telegram-claude-hero
WorkingDirectory=__HOME__/Projects/telegram-claude-hero
RunAtLoad=/tmp/telegram-claude-hero.log
KeepAlive=/tmp/telegram-claude-hero.log
StandardOutPath=http://localhost:8000
StandardErrorPath=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
